meta.title: MANARIX | Technology Consulting & Engineering
meta.description: Premium technology consulting and engineering for African enterprises — digital transformation, FinTech, cloud architecture, and enterprise platforms.

hero.title: Building Digital Platforms That Drive Business Growth
hero.subtitle: We help African businesses modernize operations, integrate digital payments, and build scalable enterprise platforms.

techTrust.title: Trusted Technologies
techTrust.subtitle: Enterprise-grade tools and platforms we use to deliver secure, scalable solutions.

transformation.title: Digital Transformation

fintech.title: FinTech & Payments
fintech.description: Integrate mobile money, banking rails, and payment gateways into unified, secure financial infrastructure for African markets.

cloud.description: Migrate, deploy, and operate cloud-native systems on AWS with CI/CD pipelines, observability, and infrastructure as code.

integration.title: System Integration
integration.description: Connect ERP, CRM, core banking, and third-party systems into cohesive, real-time data flows across your organization.

consulting.title: Technology Consulting
consulting.description: Executive advisory on technology strategy, vendor selection, architecture reviews, and digital roadmaps aligned to growth goals.

architecture.title: Enterprise-grade architecture
architecture.description: Modular, secure, and scalable systems designed for long-term operational resilience.

security.title: Secure and scalable solutions
security.description: Security-by-design with proven patterns for high-availability production environments.

fintech.title: Deep FinTech expertise
fintech.description: Payment integration, mobile money, and financial infrastructure across African markets.

cloud.title: Modern cloud technologies
cloud.description: Cloud-native delivery on AWS with containerization, CI/CD, and observability built in.

delivery.title: End-to-end delivery
delivery.description: From discovery through deployment and continuous improvement — one accountable partner.

cases.title: Case Studies
cases.subtitle: Representative outcomes from enterprise programs delivered with measurable business impact.

banking.title: Digital Banking Platform
banking.problem: Legacy core systems limited digital product launches and increased operational overhead across branches.
banking.solution: Modular banking platform with API-first architecture, automated compliance workflows, and real-time transaction monitoring.

payments.title: Payment Integration Hub
payments.problem: Multiple mobile money providers required separate integrations, slowing merchant onboarding and reconciliation.
payments.solution: Unified payment hub connecting Orange Money, Wave, and bank rails through a single API with automated settlement.

operations.title: Enterprise Operations Platform
operations.problem: Manual dispatch and inventory tracking caused delays, revenue leakage, and poor visibility across regions.
operations.solution: End-to-end operations platform with fleet tracking, automated workflows, and executive dashboards.

process.title: From Strategy to Execution
process.subtitle: A disciplined six-stage methodology that transforms strategy into production-grade systems.

development.title: Development
development.subtitle: Build and integrate with agile delivery

one.quote: Manarix delivered our payment integration hub on schedule with 99.9% uptime from day one. Their FinTech expertise and engineering discipline set them apart.
one.author: Head of Digital Banking

two.quote: They understood our business constraints before writing a single line of code. The operations platform reduced our processing time by over a third within six months.
two.author: Chief Operations Officer

three.quote: Professional, transparent, and technically excellent. Manarix bridged the gap between our executive team and engineering — and stayed through go-live.
three.author: VP Technology
